title: Apple unveils $599 MacBook Neo with iPhone A18 Pro chip in budget laptop push
summary: The MacBook has a 13.0-inch screen, making it one of the company’s smallest laptops to date. The MacBook Air, in contrast, offers a 13.6-inch display. Another twist: The Neo runs on an iPhone A18 Pro chip, marking the first time Apple is using a smartphone processor in a Mac.

title: Mass exodus looms for OpenAI as 2.5 million users vow to boycott ChatGPT after DoD deal: Report
summary: OpenAI faces mass subscription cancellations after signing a deal with the US government to use its AI for Pentagon projects. A boycott website claims 2.5 million users will quit ChatGPT while criticizing the company’s partnership with the Defense Department.

title: Satya Nadella reveals Microsoft Build 2026 dates, flagship developer event shifts to San Francisco
summary: The annual Microsoft Build conference will take place on June 2-3 in San Francisco. The conference will see a keynote by the company's CEO Satya Nadella while a list of other eminent speakers are also confirmed.

title: From iPhone 17e to MacBook Air M5: Full list of Apple products launched this week
summary: Apple launched six new products this week including the iPhone 17e with A19 processor and the MacBook Pro and Air lineup. The company is expected to showcase these products for the first time to the press at different stores throughout the world.

summary: From dependable everyday performance to reliable battery life, these laptops under ₹50,000 &nbsp;are suitable for students, professionals and remote workers.

title: Elon Musk's X cracks down on AI deepfakes during Israel-Iran war with new revenue sharing rules
summary: Elon Musk's platform X is revising its revenue-sharing programme and has warned creators about AI-generated content. The company says users posting AI videos of armed conflicts without disclosure will face 90-day suspensions from the programme, and subsequent violations will lead to permanent bans.

title: Facebook, Instagram, TikTok down? Thousands report receiving ‘Your account is currently unavailable’ message
summary: Facebook, TikTok and Instagram are down for users across the globe, with hundreds of people reporting outages. Users have reported receiving ‘Your account is currently unavailable due to a site issue’.

title: Apple hikes prices as iPhone maker unveils new MacBook Air and Pro versions — Check latest rates
summary: Apple has updated its MacBook Air and MacBook Pro with faster processors, upgraded storage, and new external monitors. Prices have increased, with the Air starting at $1,099 and the Pro at $2,199. The new models support advanced features such as Wi-Fi 7 and Bluetooth 6.

title: AI-led job disruption is real, but so is human adaptability: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella
summary: Speaking at the OMR podcast a few days ago, Nadella said employees need to reskill, learn to work with the new medium and tools, and adapt to the shift underway. Understanding AI will be essential to staying relevant as workflows evolve, he explained.

title: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella downplays AI bubble fears amid OpenAI’s $110 billion fundraise
summary: Nadella was visiting Munich for an AI tour. On the OMR podcast, he spoke about German innovations, engineers, the AI bubble, job disruption, and more. As long as AI delivers tangible, real-world impact and moves beyond theory into widespread adoption, it cannot be called a bubble, he explained.
